categories.title: Survival Challenges
categories.blurb: Gather, build, and fight to make it through in survival mode.
items: Punch a tree and collect wood
Craft some sticks
Build any type of house for your first night
Survive your first night
Kill one zombie
Hunt a sheep, a cow, and a chicken for food
Cook 10 food items
Mine your first iron
Craft a full set of armor
Defeat 3 zombies in one night

categories.title: Peaceful Challenges
categories.blurb: No monsters here — explore, tame, farm, and build in peaceful mode.
items: Survive 10 nights in peaceful mode
Build a cozy starter house
Make a bed and sleep through the night
Build a garden (without flying)
Find a village
Tame a wolf/dog
Tame a cat
Breed two animals
Build an animal pen or farm
Grow wheat, carrots, and pumpkins
Explore a cave and find some ore

categories.title: Engineering Challenges
categories.blurb: Simple redstone machines and fun contraptions.
items: Light up a redstone lamp with a lever
Open an iron door with a button
Make a door open by stepping on a pressure plate
Play a tune on note blocks

Pull a block back with a sticky piston

Build a rail track and ride a minecart
Launch your minecart using powered rails
Feed items into a chest using a hopper

items: Build a pirate ship docked at a tiny island
